errors.account_locked: Account is locked due to too many failed login attempts
errors.login_attempts_remaining: Warning: {remaining} login attempts remaining before account lockout
errors.browser_context_none: Browser context is None after launch
errors.browser_page_creation_failed: Failed to create page in browser context
errors.browser_page_init_failed: Failed to initialize page in session context
errors.message_add_failed: Failed to add message to session {session_id}
errors.chat_input_not_found: Chat input not found. You may need to login again or update selectors.
errors.timed_out_waiting_response: Timed out while waiting for response.
errors.login_not_detected: Not detected login session. Please click 'Open Login Browser' first.
errors.login_check_failed: Login check failed. Please re-open login browser to confirm page status.
errors.login_check_passed: Login check passed. Session has been persisted.
errors.browser_open_failed: Failed to open browser. Please run '.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m playwright install chromium' then retry. Error: {error}
errors.no_chat_input_detected: Chat input box not detected. Please re-open login browser to confirm page status.
errors.smoke_test_confirm_required: Please check the smoke test confirmation checkbox before executing.
errors.confirm_before_send: Please check 'I confirm send' before executing.
errors.export_no_result: No result to export. Please execute a task first.

errors.account_locked: 由于登录失败次数过多，账户已被锁定
errors.login_attempts_remaining: 警告：还剩 {remaining} 次登录尝试机会，之后账户将被锁定
errors.browser_context_none: 启动后浏览器上下文为空
errors.browser_page_creation_failed: 在浏览器上下文中创建页面失败
errors.browser_init_failed: 初始化浏览器状态失败: {error}
errors.browser_page_init_failed: 在会话上下文中初始化页面失败
errors.no_available_browser: 池中没有可用的浏览器 (超时: {timeout}秒)
errors.field_type_mismatch: 字段 '{field}': 期望 {expected}, 实际为 {actual}
errors.field_too_short: 字段 '{field}': 太短 (最小 {min}, 实际为 {actual})
errors.field_too_long: 字段 '{field}': 太长 (最大 {max}, 实际为 {actual})
errors.field_invalid_format: 字段 '{field}': 格式无效 (模式: {pattern})
errors.field_invalid_characters: 字段 '{field}': 包含无效字符 ({characters})
errors.field_forbidden_keyword: 字段 '{field}': 包含禁用关键词 '{keyword}'
errors.message_add_failed: 向会话 {session_id} 添加消息失败
errors.chat_input_not_found: 未找到聊天输入框。您可能需要重新登录或更新选择器。
errors.login_not_detected: 未检测到登录会话。请先点击'打开登录浏览器'。
errors.login_check_failed: 登录检查失败。请重新打开登录浏览器确认页面状态。
errors.login_check_passed: 登录检查通过。会话已持久化保存。
errors.browser_open_failed: 打开浏览器失败。请先执行 .venv\Scripts\python.exe -m playwright install chromium 然后重试。错误: {error}
errors.no_chat_input_detected: 未检测到聊天输入框。请重新打开登录浏览器确认页面状态。
errors.smoke_test_confirm_required: 请先勾选冒烟测试确认后再执行。
errors.smoke_test_success: 冒烟测试成功。用时 {elapsed} 秒。返回: {response}
errors.smoke_test_failed: 冒烟测试失败。用时 {elapsed} 秒。错误: {error}
errors.confirm_before_send: 请先勾选'我确认发送'后再执行。
errors.execution_success: 执行成功。用时 {elapsed} 秒。返回 {chars} 字。
errors.execution_failed: 执行失败。用时 {elapsed} 秒。错误: {error}
errors.export_no_result: 没有可导出的结果。请先执行任务。
